bird.name: Ring-tailed pigeon
bird.summary: The ring-tailed pigeon (Patagioenas caribaea) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to Jamaica.

relations.subject: Ring-tailed pigeon
relations.evidence: The IUCN initially assessed the ring-tailed pigeon as Critically Endangered but since 2000 has rated it Vulnerable "because anecdotal evidence and the many threats it faces indicate that the range and population must now be small and declining." "Both hunting and forest destruction remain rampant, and pose very serious threats"
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
